metadata.author: douglasswm
metadata.notes: Parking citation in loading-bay outside loading-bay hours. Tests Road Traffic (Parking) Rules + LTA loading bay schedules.

raw_documents.content: On 22 March 2026 at 21:35 I parked my van at the loading bay at 23 Hong Kong Street to make a 6-minute pickup of restaurant supplies. The bay sign reads 'Loading bay 0700-2100 Mon-Sat'. By 21:35 the loading-bay restriction had expired. The bay was therefore unrestricted parking. I dispute the parking ticket issued by LTA Officer 3309 at 21:38.

The bay at 23 Hong Kong Street is signed 'Loading bay 0700-2100 Mon-Sat; No Parking 2100-0700'. Photograph of full sign attached. Outside loading hours the bay reverts to a no-parking zone, not free parking. Officer 3309 issued a $70 fine under Road Traffic (Parking) Rules s.6 at 21:38 on 22 Mar 2026.
Photograph of bay signage at 23 Hong Kong Street. Full text: 'LOADING ONLY 0700-2100 MON-SAT / NO PARKING 2100-0700 / NO PARKING ALL DAY SUN & PH'. Photograph metadata: 22 Mar 2026 16:42, daylight.

legal_rules: Road Traffic (Parking) Rules s.6 (parking in restricted zones)
precedents: Public Prosecutor v Goh Lai Chuan
